leadText: Dark Aura (Japanese: ダークオーラ Dark Aura) is an Ability introduced in Generation VI. It is the signature Ability of Yveltal.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Dark Aura increases the power of Dark-type attacks by approximately 33% (or more accurately, by a factor of 5448/4096) for all Pokémon on the field. This effect is inverted by Aura Break , instead dividing the power of Dark-type attacks by 4/3, resulting in a 25% reduction in damage. The effects will not stack multiple times if more than one Pokémon has this Ability. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Dark Aura has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Dark Aura increases the power of Dark-type attacks by approximately 33% (or more accurately, by a factor of 5448/4096) for all Pokémon on the field. This effect is inverted by Aura Break , instead dividing the power of Dark-type attacks by 4/3, resulting in a 25% reduction in damage. The effects will not stack multiple times if more than one Pokémon has this Ability.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S MD Dark-type moves of all Pokémon become more powerful!
